crc32Hash.description: The CRC32 value of the file (if available). Read-only.

quickXorHash.description: A proprietary hash of the file that can be used to determine if the contents of the file change (if available). Read-only.

sha1Hash.description: SHA1 hash for the contents of the file (if available). Read-only.

sha256Hash.description: This property isn't supported. Don't use.
